name: Dutch Apple Crumb Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cold unsalted butter, cut into pieces
3 cups Peeled, cored, and chopped Apples
1/4 cup Cold unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F and grease a 9x9 inch pan.
2. In a food processor, combine flour, sugar, and salt. Add butter in pieces and process until the mixture forms a fine meal.
3. Blend the egg yolk and water. Pour over the dry ingredients and process until damp crumbs form.
4. Pat the crumbs into the bottom and halfway up the sides of the pan.
5. Bake for 25 minutes.
6. In a separate bowl, mix apples, dates, sugar, and lemon juice. Spread evenly over the crust.
7. Combine flour, oats, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt. Add butter and rub until damp crumbs form.
8. Cover the apples with the topping and pat gently.
9. Bake for an additional 40 minutes until golden brown. Cool completely before slicing.
